column1: Support Program - New Early Stage Startups - Onboarding Procedures

column3: Document No: SP-01-01-PM Rev 0
Startup completes the Assessment Meeting.
Program manager issues a need assessment form and startup founders fill it.
Program Manager sends the Needs Assessment form to the startups to fill, he gets notified when it is filled, startups get reminders daily if they did not fill it
Matching Mentros with the Startups
Communications and Outreach officer meets with program manager to discuss startup needs  and assigns lead Mentor & subject matter experts (SMEs) for the startup
Communications and Outreach officer assigns lead Mentor & subject matter experts (SMEs) for the startup  and the assigned mentors should be visible on the  startup's profile)
THE PM will connect the startups with their mentors
Startup Deliverables

Startups need to attend the below spints and submit the related deliverables shared by email from the program manager, submit deliverables by email. Startups must submit all the deliverables by email - starting this year they will need to start submiiting them by filling the form that we send at the beginning of the program and program manager and program coordinator to get notified when they submit deliverables
(there should be a dashboard showing the progress of each startup in the current cohort based on the sprints deliverables and attendance) 
 The sessions are hybrid: we take attendance manually for startups who attend in person. For online we do an automation to track attendance and we have  a checkbox for each session on zoho that the startup attended the session
Noting that there might be more sessions than the onces mentioned above, we should be able to  add session names and checkboxes anytime
Sprint#1: Tailored Strategic Roadmap
Sprint#2: Market Entry Channels and Plan
Sprint#3: Legal and Commercial
Sprint#4: Effective Analytics, Sales Funnel, and Customer Success
Sprint#5: Business Model and Financial Model Scaling
Sprint#6: Team and Culture, Business Continuity
Sprint#7: Investment Readiness and Roadshow
Weekly 1-on-1 meetings with Hani (full attendance required). zoho to send reminders to the startups weekly to book a meeting with the PM, using the link the PM provides
Monthly Entrepreneur-in-Residence (EIR) meetings (mandatory attendance).
Exit Phase
Startup completes an Exit Form by Program Manager, send reminders to fill, PM to be informed when filled
PM Conduct exit meetings.
Hani prepares and submits a final report.
